Chronicle.seasonAdvanced: Season {n} concluded — the party's Tier may rise.
Chronicle.pickQuest: Select a quest to read it.
Chronicle.noQuestsYet: No quests yet — create your first.
Chronicle.bannerHint: Click to set the banner image · drag to reposition · scroll to zoom
Chronicle.dropGiver: Drag an NPC here to set the quest giver
Chronicle.briefPlaceholder: Write the quest briefing players will read…
Chronicle.distEmpty: This quest has no rewards to distribute.
Chronicle.alreadyDistributed: These rewards were already distributed once. Distribute again?
Chronicle.complicationPlaceholder: The hidden truth the client didn't say…

grant.items: {n} item(s) added to the party stash

Chronicle.chooseParty: Choose which party receives these rewards:
Chronicle.noParty: No Party actor found — create one (with members in its folder) to receive Skill Points, Gold, and items.
Chronicle.discordNoWebhook: No Discord webhook set yet — add one in Settings → Discord.
Chronicle.discordFailed: Discord post failed — check the webhook URL (details in the console).

PROJECTANIME.Overloaded: Overloaded — Step Down both dice on every Check.

Item.refreshPrompt: Refresh {name} from its compendium source? Any local changes to this item will be overwritten.
Item.refreshNoSource: This item has no compendium source to refresh from.

Container.viewSingle: Open one bag at a time

Roll.followUpTrigger: {name} is fast enough for a Follow-Up Attack!
Roll.checkHint: Click to roll a Check with this attribute
Roll.cover: Cover — target the creature that takes this hit, then click.
Roll.goAgainLuckTuned: {name} combos through the Go Again — a Luck Die turns {from} → {to}.
Roll.goAgainLuckBound: That Luck Die is already at its limit.
Roll.luckTuneTitle: Luck Restored — Tune a Luck Die
Roll.chargeHitCarried: The focus turn's hit carries — no new roll.
Roll.allyNotSelf: This Skill targets an ally — it can't be used on yourself. Target an ally first.
Roll.allyNotFoe: This Skill targets an ally — that creature is an enemy.
Roll.foeOnly: This Skill targets a foe — that creature isn't an enemy.
Roll.noneAffectable: No one the Skill can affect was caught in the area.
Roll.needTarget: Target a creature first — hover a token and press T.
Roll.coverNoTarget: Target the covering creature first (one target), then click Cover.
Roll.coverSame: Target a different creature to cover this hit.
Roll.chargeReleases: Releases at double power on your next turn.
Roll.devourNotDefeated: Target must be reduced to 0 HP to Devour.
Roll.devourNoSkills: {name} has no new Skills to Devour.
Roll.devourPick: Choose a Skill to copy from {name}
Roll.devourAlwaysOn: Passive — automatically Devours a Skill whenever you reduce a creature to 0 HP.
Roll.luckSameDie: You can't spend one Luck die on both dice.
Roll.luckNoActor: No assigned character to spend Luck from.
Roll.luckLocked: Luck can't change a Fumble or Combo.
Roll.noGM: No active GM is online to apply this.
Roll.steppedUpProne: Target is Prone — Accuracy dice Stepped Up.
Roll.cursedNoRecovery: {name} is Cursed — no Hit Points or Energy regained.
Roll.placeBurst: Click to place the Burst · right-click to cancel
Roll.placeLine: Aim the Line and click · right-click to cancel
Roll.needToken: Place this character's token on the scene to aim this Skill.
Roll.aoeNoTargets: No targets caught in the area.
Roll.auraAffectsAlly: Aura — affects you and allies within {n} tiles.
Roll.auraAffectsAny: Aura — affects every creature within {n} tiles, including you.
Roll.placeGateA: Click to place the first gate · right-click to cancel
Roll.placeGateB: Click to place the second gate · right-click to cancel
Roll.gateOpened: Two linked gates open — any creature can step into one and emerge from the other.
Roll.senseSteppedUp: Mind + Spirit, one die Stepped Up
Roll.overcomeEnds: {name} shakes off {effect} — immune to it for the next 2 rounds.
Roll.reflected: {name}'s Reflect Turns the Technique Back on Its User

Servant.name: {name} (Servant)
Servant.notDead: Animate raises the dead — the target must be at 0 HP.
Servant.alreadyBound: That creature is already a servant or companion.
Servant.taxLine: {tier} servant — reduces your maximum Energy by {n} while it serves.
Servant.dismissConfirm: Dismiss {name}? It is released and its raised form is lost — your locked Energy returns.
Servant.notYours: Only the servant's owner can dismiss it.
Servant.companionBonded: {name} is bonded to {master} — it acts on their turn.
Servant.companionCreated: {name} is bonded to {master} as a loyal companion.

Hud.noPermission: You don't have permission to edit this character's HUD.

party.title: Party
party.dragHint: Drag to move · double-click to minimize

effectDesc.animate: Legacy Effect (moved to Modules) — raise a dead creature as a servant under your control. It acts on your turn and reduces your maximum Energy by its tier. No Modifiers.
effectDesc.bolster: Step Up one Attribute (chosen at creation) on a target. Duration: 2.
effectDesc.companion: Cost 2. Bond a creature as a loyal ally. Choose its form when you learn this Technique. Always Passive; cannot take Modifiers.
effectDesc.conjure: Create a mundane weapon, armor, or object out of nothing at range. It lasts the Scene.
effectDesc.disguise: Alter your appearance to look and sound like another person, creature, or object roughly your size. Duration: 2.
effectDesc.elementalControl: Choose an element at creation. Generate, move, or suppress that element at range. Does not affect creatures made of the element.
effectDesc.gate: Create linked portals at two open tiles within range.
effectDesc.hinder: On hit, Step Down one Attribute (chosen at creation) on an enemy. A non-willing creature contests this Technique. Duration: 2.
effectDesc.illusion: Create a false perception that only the target sees.
effectDesc.mend: Clear 1 hit box or 1 energy box (chosen at creation) on a willing creature.
effectDesc.passive: No Effect — the Technique exists entirely through its Modifiers.
effectDesc.sense: Choose a type of sense at creation. Detect all qualifying creatures, effects, or objects within 5 tiles. Duration: 2.
effectDesc.steal: Take an item from an enemy's inventory at range.
effectDesc.strike: Attack an enemy. Roll Attribute + Talent vs Guard. On a hit, the target marks hit boxes.
effectDesc.telepathy: Mind-to-mind communication with a creature at range. Duration: 2.
effectDesc.transform: Step Up one Attribute on yourself twice, or two Attributes once each. Duration: 2.
effectDesc.vanish: You cannot be seen. Attacking reveals you. Duration: 2.
effectDesc.custom: A custom effect created between Player and Storyteller.

modifierDesc.none: This Skill doesn't have a Modifier and its abilities rely on the Effect. Adds no SP or EP cost.
modifierDesc.affinityStatus: Choose a Status Effect. Target gains Resist to it, halving the duration. Can be taken more than once.
modifierDesc.analyze: On a hit, learn one category about the target: current hit and energy boxes, Attributes, or Techniques.
modifierDesc.aura: All targets within Talent die/2 tiles of you.
modifierDesc.banish: Send the target to its native plane at Storyteller's discretion. Targets Spirit.
modifierDesc.burst: All targets within Talent die/2 tiles of a chosen point within range.
modifierDesc.chain: On a hit, leap to 1 additional target within Talent die/2 tiles. Roll to hit the new target.
modifierDesc.channeled: Replace the Technique's Duration. It lasts as long as you pay 1 energy at the start of each of your turns.
modifierDesc.charge: Spend a turn focusing. Next turn, the Technique marks or clears double the hit boxes or healing. Miss means the charge fades.
modifierDesc.cleanse: Remove one detrimental status from the target.
modifierDesc.combo: When you use this Skill, you may also activate another Skill alongside it.
modifierDesc.cover: You mark the hit boxes for the target while it is within range.
modifierDesc.devour: Target must have all hit boxes marked. You learn one Technique it knows.
modifierDesc.disarm: Remove one equipped item from the target. The target contests this Technique.
modifierDesc.drainEnergy: Choose Energy. When you deal damage with this Skill, recover EP equal to half the damage dealt.
modifierDesc.drainHP: Choose HP. When you deal damage with this Skill, recover HP equal to half the damage dealt.
modifierDesc.immunity: Heavy. Choose a Status Effect. Target is Immune to it.
modifierDesc.inflict: On hit, apply one status (chosen at creation): Blinded, Lingering, Prone, Slowed, or Weakened. Duration: 2.
modifierDesc.infuse: Choose a Status Effect. The target's weapons inflict it on hit for the duration.
modifierDesc.line: All targets in a straight line up to range.
modifierDesc.manifest: One of your Passive Techniques becomes active only while this Technique is active. That Passive's locked energy is unlocked while it runs.
modifierDesc.mass: All valid targets in the Technique's range.
modifierDesc.mental: This Skill targets the mind. Choose Mind, Spirit, or Charm. Targets the chosen Attribute instead of EVA.
modifierDesc.move: Move up to your Talent die/2 tiles.
modifierDesc.nullify: End one ongoing Technique on the target. The target contests this Technique.
modifierDesc.pierce: This Skill ignores the target's DEF or RES.
modifierDesc.protection: The target gains +1 Guard. Duration follows the Technique.
modifierDesc.pull: Pull the target 2 tiles toward you.
modifierDesc.push: Push the target 2 tiles away from you.
modifierDesc.reequip: Before or after using this Technique, switch one piece of equipment.
modifierDesc.retaliation: When an enemy marks hit boxes on the target, that enemy marks 1 hit box.
modifierDesc.scene: The Technique lasts the entire scene.
modifierDesc.secondaryEffect: The Technique gains a second Effect.
modifierDesc.waypoint: Gate only. Place a permanent portal at a named location you visit. You and designated creatures can travel between your Waypoints.
modifierDesc.custom: A custom Modifier agreed between Player and Storyteller. May carry the Heavy tier.
modifierDesc.barrier: The target gains temporary hit boxes equal to the Technique's total energy cost, up to their maximum hit boxes. When the Technique ends, unmarked temporary boxes vanish.
modifierDesc.drain: When you deal damage with this Technique, clear 1 hit box or 1 energy box (chosen at creation) for each creature damaged.
modifierDesc.inflictSevere: On hit, apply one: Bound, Cursed (choose hit or energy boxes), Exposed, or Sealed. Duration: 2.
modifierDesc.link: When you use this Technique, also activate another Technique you know. Pay its energy cost separately.
modifierDesc.potent: +1 hit box marked or cleared. Can be taken twice.
modifierDesc.reflect: The next Technique that targets you redirects to the user. Consumed on use.
modifierDesc.regen: Clear 1 hit box at the start of each of your turns. Duration follows the Technique.
modifierDesc.reposition: Move another creature up to your Talent die/2 tiles in any direction.

narr.transfers: transfers up to {dmg} of the caster's own {pool}
narr.targetWeapon: a target within your weapon's reach
narr.everyone: everything within {n} tiles of a chosen point
narr.pierce: ignores the target's DEF or RES
narr.chain: leaps to 1 additional target within {n} tiles (roll to hit)
narr.drainHP: You heal for half the damage dealt.
narr.drainEnergy: You recover Energy equal to half the damage dealt.
narr.drainHPPassive: Your basic attacks heal you for half the damage dealt.
narr.drainEnergyPassive: Your basic attacks recover Energy equal to half the damage dealt.
narr.decay: Afterward, the target takes {dmg} Lingering damage at the end of each of their turns while it lasts.
narr.cleanse: It removes one detrimental status from the target.
narr.cover: You mark the hit boxes for the target while it is within range.
narr.charge: You spend a turn focusing; next turn it marks or clears double the boxes. A miss fades the charge.
narr.moveMod: moves you up to {self} tiles, or your target up to {n} tiles, in a direction of your choice
narr.moveModNoActor: moves you up to your Movement, or your target up to {n} tiles, in a direction of your choice
narr.protection: It grants the target {n} Guard while it lasts.
narr.retaliation: While it lasts, an enemy that marks hit boxes on the target marks {dmg} hit box.
narr.analyze: On a hit, you learn the target's {category}.
narr.banish: On a hit, the target is sent to its native plane of existence (it may use Spirit to evade).
narr.infuse: It imbues the target's weapons with {thing}.
narr.manifest: One of your Passive Techniques runs as active while this lasts — its locked energy unlocks.
narr.manifestNamed: Your Passive Technique {name} runs as active while this lasts — its energy lock is lifted.
narr.combo: When you use it, you may also activate another Skill alongside it.
narr.disarm: It removes one equipped item from the target; the target contests this Technique.
narr.waypoint: You may place a permanent portal at a named location you visit; you and designated creatures can travel between your Waypoints.
narr.affinityStatusResist: The target gains Resist to {thing} — its duration is halved.
narr.nullify: It ends one ongoing Technique on the target; the target contests this Technique.
narr.reequip: Before or after using it, you may switch one piece of equipment.
narr.reequipHeavy: Before or after using it, you may swap your entire equipment loadout.
narr.onHit: On a hit, the target gains {status}.
narr.skillEvasionLine: The target evades with {attr} in place of Agility.
narr.skillEvasionLinePair: The target evades with the better of {attr} in place of Agility.
narr.animate: It raises a dead creature within range as a servant under your control — it returns with the Hit Points, Energy, Attributes, and Skills it had in life (losing any Skill ranked above this one, and any Animate or Companion Skill), and acts on your turn with its own Move and Action.
narr.animateTiers: While the servant exists, it reduces your maximum Energy by its tier: Minion {minion} · Standard {standard} · Elite {elite} · Solo {solo}.
narr.companion: A creature is bonded to you as a loyal ally — one Talent at d6, one Technique, its own hit and energy boxes; on your turn you act or the Companion acts.
narr.conjure: It creates a mundane weapon, armor, or object out of nothing at range; it lasts the Scene.
narr.disguise: You look and sound like another person, creature, or object roughly your size.
narr.elementalControl: Choose an element: generate, move, or suppress it at range. It does not affect creatures made of the element.
narr.elementalControlTyped: You command {element}: generate, move, or suppress it at range. It does not affect creatures made of the element.
narr.gate: It opens linked portals at two open tiles within range.
narr.illusion: It creates a false perception that only the target sees.
narr.steal: On a hit, it takes an item from the enemy's inventory.
narr.stealEquipped: On a hit, it snatches an item from the target's possession — even something EQUIPPED, won through a Contested Check against the target's Might + Agility or Might + Spirit.
narr.telepathy: You speak mind to mind with a creature at range.
narr.vanish: You cannot be seen while it lasts. Attacking reveals you.
narr.senseVanish: A Vanished creature inside your sense can be found: roll Mind + Spirit — one die Stepped Up — against its Skill Evasion.
narr.passiveCarrier: This Technique is always active — its Modifiers apply continuously.
narr.channeledLine: It lasts while you channel it: spend {n} Energy at the start of each of your turns or it ends.
narr.passiveLine: This Skill is always active and costs no Energy, but lowers your maximum Energy by {n} while known.
narr.auraLineAlly: As an aura, it applies to you and allies within {n} tiles of you.
narr.auraLineEnemy: As an aura, it applies to enemies within {n} tiles of you.
narr.auraLineAny: As an aura, it applies to every creature within {n} tiles of you, including yourself.
narr.move: lets you move up to {n} tiles
narr.reposition: moves another creature up to {n} tiles in any direction
narr.contests: A non-willing creature contests this Technique.
narr.sense: You detect all qualifying creatures, effects, or objects within {n} tiles.
narr.barrier: The target gains {n} temporary hit boxes (up to their maximum); unmarked ones vanish when it ends.
narr.customMod: It carries a custom Modifier agreed with the Storyteller (see its description).
narr.devour: If the target has every hit box marked, you learn one Technique it knows.
narr.drain: When it deals damage, you clear {n} {pool} box for each creature damaged.
narr.link: When you use it, you may also activate another Technique you know, paying its energy cost separately.
narr.potent: It marks or clears {n} additional box(es).
narr.reflect: The next Technique that targets the bearer redirects to its user; consumed on use.
narr.regen: The target clears {n} hit box at the start of each of their turns while it lasts.
narr.passiveSustained: Always active (Sustained). It locks {n} energy boxes.
narr.passiveStanding: It fires on its own when its condition is met, without an Action (Standing). It locks {n} energy boxes.
narr.companionLock: It locks {n} energy boxes while the Companion adventures with you; left home, the boxes are free.

Effect.title: Effects
Effect.applyNoTarget: Select a token (or assign a character) to apply the effect to.
Effect.removeFromItem: {name} comes from {item} — unequip or remove that item to clear it.
Effect.removeNoPermission: You don't have permission to remove that effect.
Effect.name: Name
Effect.toggleableHint: Player flips this on/off (off by default) — for a situational boon like "+1 Charm vs nobles".
Effect.luckTune: On Luck Restore, Tune a Die ±
Effect.channelEnd: {name} can no longer pay for {skill} — the channel ends.
Effect.stunnedSkip: {name} is Stunned and skips their turn.
Effect.recovered: {name} recovers to {hp} HP as combat ends.
Effect.comboTurn: {name} takes an extra turn from the Combo!
Effect.woundBar: {name} has three Wounds and cannot enter a Conflict Scene.

creation.name: Character Creation
creation.label: Configure Character Creation
creation.hint: Attribute Step-Ups and the creation Choices.
creation.title: Character Creation
creation.notPackage: Only Packages can be choice options.

bioFields.name: Bio Fields
bioFields.label: Configure Bio Fields
bioFields.title: Bio Dossier Fields
bioFields.pick: Choose an image, or type a Font Awesome class
bioFields.empty: No fields defined — add one, or restore the defaults.

tokenSettings.name: Token Settings
tokenSettings.label: Configure Token Settings
tokenSettings.hint: Who can see tokens' HP / Energy bars, and the hover Token Info Panel.
tokenSettings.title: Token Settings

discord.name: Discord
discord.label: Configure Discord
discord.hint: The channel webhook URL that quests post to when you use Post to Discord.
discord.title: Discord Integration

rangeLine.name: Canvas — Range Line
rangeLine.hint: Hovering a token while one of yours is selected draws a measured line between them with the tile distance. Each player can hide it for themselves from the Token scene controls.

trackerVisible.name: Quests — Show Tracker
trackerVisible.hint: Show the floating on-canvas tracker for the quest you're following. The tracker's eye-slash button also hides it; tracking a quest turns it back on.

phaseBanner.name: Combat — Phase Banner (show for me)
phaseBanner.hint: Sweep a PLAYER PHASE / ENEMY PHASE banner across the screen when the side phase flips.

comboSplash.name: Combat — Combo Splash
comboSplash.hint: A cinematic full-screen flash when someone rolls a Combo (matching 6+).
comboSplash.clientHint: Hide the Combo flash just for you; the table setting stays on for everyone else.

accentColor.name: Sheets — Player Accent Color
accentColor.hint: Tints your character sheets — window trim, glow, Energy bar, and highlights. Every player sees their own color.

enabled.name: Cinematic HUD
enabled.hint: Replace the macro hotbar and the bottom-left names with the anime HUD console + party rail. Turn this off to use Foundry's default bars.

selectMode.name: Bar Follows
selectMode.hint: My Character keeps the bar on your assigned character. Selected Token makes it follow whichever token you own and have selected — driving that creature's full stats + sidebars without opening its sheet.

intensity.name: HUD Style Intensity
intensity.hint: How much anime-HUD flourish: Restrained (subtle), Cinematic (balanced), or Full Anime (skewed slots, scanlines, stronger glow).

party.name: Show Party HUD
party.hint: Show party member cards at the lower-left (draggable) in place of the names list.

combat.name: Encounter Tracker
combat.hint: During combat, show the turn order + initiative next to the chat, with an End Turn button for players.

hudSettings.name: Cinematic HUD
hudSettings.label: Configure HUD
hudSettings.hint: Enable/disable the HUD console, party rail, and encounter tracker, and choose the style — all in one place.
hudSettings.title: Cinematic HUD

Advancement.title: Advancement
Advancement.vitalsSet: Set HP to {hp} and Energy to {energy} from attributes.
Advancement.refineWarn: Skill Enhancement is earned with the Refine activity during a rest.

Rest.title: Rest
Rest.campRecent: {names} camped within the last 24 hours. Rest anyway?

SkillBuilder.title: Technique Builder
SkillBuilder.passiveNoMod: This Technique can't take that Modifier.
SkillBuilder.servantNoEffect: A Servant or Companion can't take the Companion Effect.
SkillBuilder.needManifest: Choose the Passive Technique Manifest wakes.
SkillBuilder.strikeRangeNote: Strike at Weapon Range deals the weapon's Damage and Threshold applies; any other Range marks 1 hit box, no Threshold.

SkillLog.title: Skill Point Log
SkillLog.confirmAttribute: Undo “{label}” and every higher raise stacked on it, refunding {amount} SP total?

Creator.title: Character Creator
Creator.stepsRemaining: Distribute all your Step-Ups first ({n} left).
Creator.choiceMissing: That option's package could not be found.
Creator.weaponRequired: Pick a Weapon Style and name your weapon.
Creator.weaponPairSame: The second Attribute must differ — only Heavy may pair Might + Might.
Creator.armorRequired: Pick an Armor Style and name your armor.

MonsterCreator.title: Monster Creator
MonsterCreator.pickRoleTierFirst: Pick a Role and a Tier first.
MonsterCreator.supportNote: At Least One Heal or Empower

SkillBrowser.title: Skill Compendium
SkillBrowser.missing: That skill's source could not be found.

counter.name: Counter
counter.desc: React · Attack from range 1: strike back first.

drainTouch.name: Drain Touch
drainTouch.desc: On hit, recover HP equal to half the damage dealt.

dreadAura.name: Dread Aura
dreadAura.desc: Passive · Foes within 2 tiles Step Down Charm.

guard.name: Guard
guard.desc: React · An ally within 2 tiles is attacked: take the hit instead.

mend.name: Mend
mend.desc: Restore HP equal to the Strong die value to an ally within range 3.

reinforce.name: Reinforce
reinforce.desc: One Swarm of the same tier arrives at a board edge.

sweep.name: Sweep
sweep.desc: Attack all targets within 2 tiles of a point in range.

warcry.name: Warcry
warcry.desc: Allies within 2 tiles Step Up one Attribute (Duration 2).

Threat.label: Threat
Threat.hint: Threat — this enemy's cost against the encounter budget.
Threat.swarmHalf: Swarms may not exceed half the budget.
Threat.minionHalf: Minions may not exceed half the budget.

Rival.label: Rival
Rival.badgeHint: A recurring named villain built on full PC rules — counts as Elite + 1 Threat and grows with the party.

Boss.label: Boss
Boss.badgeHint: One enemy built to fight the whole party. Its HP is split into Bars.
Boss.barsHint: The Boss takes one full turn per remaining Bar. A broken Bar loses excess damage, ends its statuses, and may let it Shift.
Boss.barBroken: {name}'s Bar breaks! ({remaining} of {total} left) — statuses cleared; it may Shift.
Boss.defeated: {name}'s last Bar breaks — the Boss is defeated!
Boss.breakUnlocks: A Break Unlocks the Next Bar's Techniques

Party.name: Party
Party.membersArePCs: Only Player Characters go in the party roster.
Party.encounterAreMonsters: Only NPCs (monsters) go in the encounter.
Party.itemsAreGear: Only items (not Skills) can be stashed.
Party.deleteConfirm: Delete the party "{name}"? Its sidebar folder is removed too — member characters are kept (they fall back to the directory root).

openParty.name: Open Party Sheet
openParty.hint: Open your party's sheet — the party whose folder holds a character you own, or the first party.

Wound.hint: Each Wound Locks a Hit Box Until Cleared at a Town

AdvLog.title: Advancement Log
AdvLog.confirmCascade: Undo “{label}” and every higher step stacked on it, refunding {amount} total?
